positive: A stylized, symmetrical cosmic landscape featuring bioluminescent flora and geometric mountain ranges set against a deep indigo and cosmic purple nebula sky. The composition must be centralized and highly graphic, using clean, sharp linework and strong silhouettes. Integrate abstract constellations and glowing celestial bodies (teal and cyan hues) with soft gold accents. The art style should evoke detailed vector illustration and graphic novel quality, ensuring exceptional contrast between the deep background void and the glowing subjects. Perfect for apparel printing, minimalist yet complex.
negative: text, words, letters, signatures, low quality, blur, jpeg artifacts, grainy, noise, watermark, extra limbs, bad anatomy, mutated, cartoon, childish, grayscale, monochrome, logo, trademark, copyrighted characters
